main.description: A hyperboard record that wraps an underlying activity or collection with visual presentation configuration. One board per hyperboard, stored in the creator's PDS.

subject.description: Reference to the org.hypercerts.claim.activity or org.hypercerts.claim.collection this board visualizes.

config.description: Board-level visual configuration (background, colors, aspect ratio).

items.description: Per-contributor presentation overrides for this board.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created.

boardConfig.description: Visual configuration for a hyperboard's background, colors, and layout.

backgroundGrayscale.description: Whether the background is rendered in grayscale. Default: true.

backgroundOpacity.description: Background opacity as a decimal string from '0' to '1'.

backgroundColor.description: Background color as a hex string (e.g. '#ffffff').

borderColor.description: Border color as a hex string (e.g. '#000000').

grayscaleImages.description: Whether contributor images are rendered in grayscale. Default: false.

aspectRatio.description: Display aspect ratio of the board.

boardItem.description: Per-contributor presentation override within a specific board.

itemRef.description: Reference to the contributor record (org.hypercerts.claim.contributorInformation) being styled.

displayName.description: Display name override for this contributor on this board.

image.description: Avatar or face image override URI for this contributor on this board.

videoUrl.description: Video URL (direct or embed) displayed for this contributor.

hoverImageUrl.description: Image overlay shown when hovering over this contributor.

hoverIframeUrl.description: Iframe overlay shown when hovering over this contributor.

circularImage.description: Whether to crop the contributor image to a circle. Default: true.

url.description: Click-through link URL for this contributor.

isBlueprint.description: Whether this item is a blueprint placeholder (not a real contributor).
